_comment: Stub LLM response fixture — simulates a medium-confidence escalate decision from 04_decide.rl.
_usage: Used by tests that assert the pipeline escalates when confidence is medium and subject is priority category.

attributes.reasoning_summary: Medium confidence with priority subject — escalating to human operator for review rather than acting autonomously.

goals_resolved: determine final Decision as one of: proceed, defer, escalate, skip
assign confidence_score to Decision between 0.0 and 1.0
assign reasoning_summary to Decision in plain text
annotate Decision with dry_run_active from BotState configuration
goals_deferred: evaluate PrimaryAction for Decision with confidence threshold 0.65

raw_llm_text:
The subject is in the priority category but analysis confidence is only medium. Autonomous action carries unacceptable risk at this confidence level. Escalating to a human operator for final review and decision.

Decision has action of "escalate".
Decision has confidence_score of 0.72.
Decision has reasoning_summary of "Medium confidence with priority subject — escalating to human operator for review rather than acting autonomously.".
Decision has dry_run_active of "true".
